title: Faithfully
why_this_song: Faithfully by Journey (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I'm forever yours, faithfully"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I'm forever yours, faithfully"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I'm forever yours, faithfully"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Ain't no place to start a family"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Wheels go 'round and 'round"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yours" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yours" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "forever" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "forever" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ain't always what it's supposed to be

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh, girl, you stand by me

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Faithfully" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Faithfully" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Faithfully", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Faithfully", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Faithfully" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Faithfully" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
